reason: Flask session cookie leak. Blocked from upgrade by upstream sagemaker-containers pin; not exploitable in SageMaker managed container context (no session exposure).
Jinja2 sandbox escape. Blocked from upgrade by upstream dependency chain; no user-controlled templates rendered in serving/training path.
Jinja2 sandbox escape. Blocked from upgrade by upstream dependency chain; no user-controlled templates rendered in serving/training path.
Werkzeug multipart upload DoS. Blocked from upgrade by upstream dependency chain; SageMaker manages inbound traffic and controls request size.
Werkzeug debugger RCE. Debugger disabled in production container.
Werkzeug multipart DoS. Blocked from upgrade by upstream dependency chain; SageMaker controls inbound traffic.

Werkzeug HTTP request smuggling. Disputed by Werkzeug maintainers: this behavior can only occur in unsupported configurations involving development mode and an HTTP server from outside the Werkzeug project.
Werkzeug multipart resource exhaustion. Blocked from upgrade by upstream dependency chain; SageMaker controls inbound traffic.
gevent WebSocket parser DoS. WebSocket protocol not exposed in serving/training path.
urllib3 outbound HTTP vulnerability. Fix requires urllib3 2.x, blocked by transitive dependency cap; container makes only outbound calls to trusted AWS APIs.
urllib3 outbound HTTP vulnerability. Fix requires urllib3 2.x, blocked by transitive dependency cap; container makes only outbound calls to trusted AWS APIs.
urllib3 outbound HTTP vulnerability. Fix requires urllib3 2.x, blocked by transitive dependency cap; container makes only outbound calls to trusted AWS APIs.
protobuf vulnerability. Version hard-capped by upstream SageMaker training toolkit; not exploitable via container's typed protobuf usage.
jaraco.context vendored in setuptools. Likely scanner false positive (installed setuptools version post-dates the reported fix); tarball extraction not used in serving/training path.
pyarrow Arrow C++ IPC reader use-after-free. IPC file reading not in serving/training path.
